_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in processing digital forensic data
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Skill DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-002 (SP, cosine: 0.493), RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.477).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.483). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. NICE-only terms [digital, forensic, processing] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.924, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.062 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.3%). "Skill in processing digital forensic data" and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 > STS 0.483 (gap +0.055). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. NICE-only: [digital, forensic, processing]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].
